title: PlayerQuests (Archived)
description: Survival-friendly questing by the players for the players!
body:
![Player Quests Under Development Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/N5NJr7y3/images/ca3ac817e9d55bd24238766c4f746291b5d2c9ae.png) # PlayerQuests ☼ - Not being updated past 1.21.10 - Install [Citizens2](https://ci.citizensnpcs.co/job/citizens2/) to use entities as NPCs! - Where survival players without cheats can create quests! (with inventories as adorable GUIs). - This plugin is still being improved, [see the plan](https://gitlab.com/sammypanda/MCJE-PlayerQuests-Plugin/-/milestones)! - Help with the code [here](https://gitlab.com/sammypanda/MCJE-PlayerQuests-Plugin/tree/main/branding/docs/developers#readme)!
How to add | How to configure | About and community






View the tutorial! and ask in the discord to
try it in the available test server ^_^


To add to your server, follow these steps ✿

  1. Make sure you're on Java 21 at least.
  2. Download the latest .jar file.
  3. Drag and drop the .jar file into the server 'plugins' folder.
    • Note: Create the plugins folder if it doesn't exist.
  4. (Optional) Do the same with the Citizens2 plugin to be able to use entities as NPCs!

No configuration options ✎

- Keeping it simple.

Disabling telemetry ⚛

- This plugin uses [bStats](https://github.com/Bastian/bStats) to share how many servers are using the plugin. - To disable bStats: 1. Create a folder in plugins/ called ``bStats`` (case sensitive) 2. In it create a file called config.yml - Type in it ``enabled: false`` - To enable, delete the bStats folder and reload/restart, it'll default to ``enabled: true``.

It's perfect for ☆

- Cute small servers amongst friends - Lore and world-building enthusiasts - Any plugin-friendly survival servers - Lovely community-driven RPG servers
# Making things together ♡ - Just some community highlights! Favourite magical moments, creative quests, and feedback. - *None here yet! Join the [discord](https://discord.gg/EvWVSn9URf)!*
# Join the community ☾

- [Join our little Discord community](http://discord.gg/EvWVSn9URf) - [Let me help you on GitHub](http://github.com/sammypanda/MCJE-PlayerQuests-Plugin/issues/) - [Contribute to the code](https://github.com/sammypanda/MCJE-PlayerQuests-Plugin/tree/main/branding/docs/developers#readme)
![Under development Player Quests logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/N5NJr7y3/4c553e635db0e78de0720b46d15cef6f59b56c14.png)
